close_reason: Added clippy, rustfmt, rust-analyzer, and cargo-edit to registry and toolchain.toml
description:
Make sure essential Rust development tools are included in the devenv shell:
- cargo clippy (linting)
- rustfmt (formatting)
- cargo-edit (for cargo add/rm)
- rust-analyzer (LSP, if not already available)

These should be available when rust/cargo is declared in toolchain.toml. May need to use rustup components or nixpkgs rust-bin overlay for proper toolchain composition.
title: Ensure Rust tooling (clippy, rustfmt, etc.) available in toolchain
